allow: Bash(node -e "let d=''; process.stdin.on\('data',c=>d+=c\); process.stdin.on\('end',\(\)=>{ let r=JSON.parse\(d\); r.shifts.forEach\(s=>console.log\('Shift:', s.name, '| Assigned:', s.stats.assigned, '| Present:', s.stats.present\)\); }\)")

Bash(node -e "let d=''; process.stdin.on\('data',c=>d+=c\); process.stdin.on\('end',\(\)=>{ let a=JSON.parse\(d\); a.forEach\(t=>console.log\(t.status, '|', t.title,'| Assignee:', t.assignee_name\)\); }\)")
